creator: wjw@digiware.nl
text:
(In reply to Adriaan de Groot from comment #13)

I've also asked the Ceph CMake wizard to take a look at this.

It sort of annoys me that an upgrade would break in this weird way.
Could be that Ceph was using a deprecated feature, but usually these are prevented far before they get final.

And testing this, I have to be careful not to break my working environment.
